questionHtml:
What is the role of the joint capsule in a hip joint?

A. It seals the joint to retain the synovial fluid.

B. It provides a point of attachment for muscles.

C. It produces cartilage to reduce friction during movement.

D. It directs the formation of bone tissue during growth and development.

meta.title: What is the role of the joint capsule in a hip joint? A. It seals the joint to retain the synovial fluid. B. It provides a point of attachment for muscles. C. It produces cartilage
